assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md line 19 shows the exact JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC" — both required clauses are present verbatim.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 7-14 state the filtering criteria: "For each result, inspect issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type 'Depend'." Each of the three candidate issues (TC-9020, TC-9023, TC-9026) has a "Linked remediation Tasks (Depend)" section listing the linked task issue keys, their issue types, and their statuses — confirming the skill fetched each linked task's status.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 54 shows TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with "TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)" in the Remediation Tasks column. ready-for-qa.md lines 37-42 confirm TC-9021 is Task/Done/Yes and TC-9022 is Task/Closed/Yes, concluding "Result: QUALIFIED — Ready for QA".

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 62 states TC-9023 is excluded with reason "Remediation in progress: TC-9025 is still In Progress". ready-for-qa.md lines 59-66 show TC-9025 is Task/In Progress/No and the result is "EXCLUDED — Remediation in progress" because "TC-9025 remains In Progress".

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 63 states TC-9026 is excluded with reason "No linked Tasks with type 'Depend' exist (no remediation to verify)". ready-for-qa.md line 78 states "None. This issue has no issuelinks entries with link type 'Depend'" and the result is "EXCLUDED — No remediation to verify".

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 52-54 show the Ready for QA table with columns "Issue | Status | CVE | Summary | Created | Remediation Tasks" and the row for TC-9020 populates the Remediation Tasks column with "TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)".

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 56 states "Proposed action for TC-9020: Consider transitioning to ON_QA. All linked remediation tasks are complete." ready-for-qa.md line 45 similarly states "Proposed action: Transition TC-9020 to ON_QA. All linked remediation tasks are complete — the CVE fix is ready for verification testing."
